name: Elysian Waters - 37x40 Round Pool Deck Plan | Wrap-Around Above-Ground Deck | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Spacious 37x40 circular deck footprint - stunning wrap-around design
Designed to complement 27ft round above-ground pools
Large lounging surface fits chairs, dining sets, umbrellas & storage benches
Built-in railing system for style and safety
Wide built staircase for easy pool entry and exit
Designed for DIY builders - clean instructions and material guidance
Includes full cut list, framing layouts, and hardware specs
Turns backyard pools into statement-making outdoor living spaces
description_summary: Escape to your own private paradise with Elysian Waters, a sweeping 37x40 circular pool deck designed to turn any backyard into a luxury retreat. With an expansive walk-around layout, secure railings, and generous platform space, this deck transforms an ordinary 27ft above-ground pool into a year-round destination for family fun, relaxation, and poolside entertaining. Whether you're sunbathing, watching the kids splash, hosting friends, or enjoying golden-hour evenings outdoors, Elysian Water...
